title: carthamus lucens
intro: Carthamus lucens, also known as false safflower, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carthamus lucens include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Carthamus lucens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
